summary: Planned conservative live-PR inventory classification for 5 open PRs. No canonical was selected because the job is an inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. No close, merge, fix, label, or comment action is recommended.

actions.reason: Distinct useful PR with no hydrated duplicate or superseding canonical in this inventory shard; keep it open for normal maintainer review.
Broad but substantive open PR with a distinct linked issue and no hydrated duplicate/superseding PR in this shard; keep independent for maintainer review rather than close or merge.
Potential low-signal docs PR, but low-signal closeout is disabled for this job and no shared canonical exists; keep independent rather than close.
Focused useful fix PR with no hydrated duplicate or superseding canonical in this shard; keep open for maintainer review.
Substantive open PR with distinct session-state/message-delivery risk and no hydrated duplicate or superseding canonical; keep independent for maintainer review.
